# Linkwire

> Linkwire is a link intelligence and IP tracking platform that lets users create smart tracking links to capture visitor metadata — including IP address, geolocation, device info, browser, and referrer — when a link is clicked. It is a lightweight, cutting-edge alternative to Grabify, designed for developers, security researchers, and network administrators.
 
Linkwire allows users to wrap any destination URL inside a trackable smart link. When the link is visited, Linkwire silently logs connection metadata before transparently redirecting the visitor to the intended destination. No malware, no phishing — purely passive connection data collection for legitimate use cases.
 
Important notes:
- Linkwire is intended for lawful purposes only: network diagnostics, security research, penetration testing with scope, and verifying where traffic originates from.
- Users are responsible for complying with applicable privacy laws (GDPR, CCPA, etc.) when collecting visitor data.
- Linkwire does not store link targets longer than the user's configured retention period.
- Linkwire does not support cloaked redirects that impersonate other websites.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://app.linkwire.cc/) Main landing page with product overview.
- [Login](https://app.linkwire.cc/login) Login page for existing users.
- [Signup](https://app.linkwire.cc/signup) Signup page for new users.

## Key Features

- Link Creation: Wrapping a destination URL, choosing a slug, and setting expiration
- Captured Data Fields: Full reference of all metadata fields — IP, ASN, geolocation, ISP, user-agent, device type, OS, browser, referrer, and timestamp
- Real-Time Dashboard: Viewing and filtering click events in the web UI

## Integrations

- Email Notifications: Receive real-time alerts in your inbox when a tracking link is clicked.
